title: centaurea phrygia
intro: Centaurea phrygia, also known as Phrygian cornflower, is a perennial plant in the family Asteraceae, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea phrygia include reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and relief from pain and fever. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
